RemediationStrings.Title: MSAOptional (Local Policies Security Options)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\System\MSAOptional must be 1. Severity: Medium. Category: Local Policies Security Options.

RemediationStrings.Title: DisableAutomaticRestartSignOn (Local Policies Security Options)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\System\DisableAutomaticRestartSignOn must be 1. Severity: Medium. Category: Local Policies Security Options.

RemediationStrings.Title: LocalAccountTokenFilterPolicy (Local Policies Security Options)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\System\LocalAccountTokenFilterPolicy must be 0. Severity: Critical. Category: Local Policies Security Options.

RemediationStrings.Title: EnableMPR (Local Policies Security Options)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\System\EnableMPR must be 0. Severity: Medium. Category: Local Policies Security Options.

RemediationStrings.Title: ProcessCreationIncludeCmdLine_Enabled (Local Policies Security Options)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\System\Audit\ProcessCreationIncludeCmdLine_Enabled must be 1. Severity: Medium. Category: Local Policies Security Options.

RemediationStrings.Title: ConsentPromptBehaviorEnhancedAdmin (Local Policies Security Options)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\System\ConsentPromptBehaviorEnhancedAdmin must be 1. Severity: High. Category: Local Policies Security Options.

RemediationStrings.Title: TypeOfAdminApprovalMode (Local Policies Security Options)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\System\TypeOfAdminApprovalMode must be 2. Severity: Medium. Category: Local Policies Security Options.

RemediationStrings.Title: ScRemoveOption (Local Policies Security Options)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Winlogon\ScRemoveOption must be 1. Severity: Medium. Category: Local Policies Security Options.

RemediationStrings.Title: InactivityTimeoutSecs (Local Policies Security Options)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\System\InactivityTimeoutSecs must be 900. Severity: Medium. Category: Local Policies Security Options.

RemediationStrings.Title: ConsentPromptBehaviorAdmin (Local Policies Security Options)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\System\ConsentPromptBehaviorAdmin must be 2. Severity: High. Category: Local Policies Security Options.

RemediationStrings.Title: EnableSecureUIAPaths (Local Policies Security Options)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\System\EnableSecureUIAPaths must be 1. Severity: Medium. Category: Local Policies Security Options.

RemediationStrings.Title: EnableLUA (Local Policies Security Options)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\System\EnableLUA must be 1. Severity: Critical. Category: Local Policies Security Options.

RemediationStrings.Title: ConsentPromptBehaviorUser (Local Policies Security Options)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\System\ConsentPromptBehaviorUser must be 0. Severity: High. Category: Local Policies Security Options.

RemediationStrings.Title: EnableInstallerDetection (Local Policies Security Options)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\System\EnableInstallerDetection must be 1. Severity: Medium. Category: Local Policies Security Options.

RemediationStrings.Title: FilterAdministratorToken (Local Policies Security Options)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\System\FilterAdministratorToken must be 1. Severity: Critical. Category: Local Policies Security Options.

RemediationStrings.Title: EnableVirtualization (Local Policies Security Options)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\System\EnableVirtualization must be 1. Severity: Medium. Category: Local Policies Security Options.
